task_completion.description: Open the 'Sample House' project in DreamPlan Home Design Software.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The DreamPlan Home Design Software application is open, and a pre-built house project (Sample House) is loaded in the workspace.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the kitchen area of the house.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The camera or viewport is focused on a kitchen environment, identifiable by base counters, appliances (like a stove or fridge), or a sink.

task_completion.description: Place at least three (3) upper/wall kitchen cabinets.
task_completion.visual_evidence: At least three distinct wall cabinet objects from the Kitchen category are visible in the scene.

task_completion.description: Ensure the cabinets are mounted above the counters and aligned with the wall.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The added cabinets are elevated on the wall (not resting on the floor), positioned above the base counters, and flush against the wall surface.

task_completion.description: Ensure the cabinets are visible in the final 3D view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The software viewport is set to a 3D view mode (not a 2D floor plan), clearly displaying the newly added upper cabinets in 3D perspective.
A 'Save As' dialog box showing the file path 'Documents\DreamPlan' and the file name 'kitchen_renovation.dpp', or the application title bar updating to show 'kitchen_renovation.dpp'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the DreamPlan Home Design Software GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Mouse clicks, menu navigation, and object placement occur within the actual DreamPlan application interface, not via a terminal or script.

integrity.description: The cabinets were placed using the software's built-in tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The cabinets integrate properly with the 3D scene (showing correct perspective, lighting, and software-specific selection outlines) rather than appearing as pasted 2D images.

integrity.description: The project was saved using the software's native save functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard OS or application save dialog is visible and actively used to input the required file path and name.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires placing at least 3 cabinets. The furniture category must be 'Kitchen' and the item type must be 'Wall Cabinet'. Wall cabinets are distinct from base cabinets; they must be mounted higher up on the wall and not resting on the floor.
